ai_guidance: Reported details considered: patient breathing fast. Ensure scene safety before approaching patient. Control visible bleeding with direct pressure. Keep neck and spine movement minimal. Continuously observe breathing and responsiveness. These measures are supportive first aid only and not a medical diagnosis.
